allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import urllib.request, json; data=json.loads\(urllib.request.urlopen\('https://pypi.org/pypi/mlagents-envs/json'\).read\(\)\); print\('latest:', data['info']['version']\); print\('all:', sorted\([k for k in data['releases'].keys\(\)], key=lambda v: [int\(x\) for x in v.split\('.'\) if x.isdigit\(\)]\)\)\)")
